title: Finding work in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Finding work in New Zealand
Find out how to find and apply for jobs in New Zealand, as well as information on the main job industries — education, health care, information technology, agriculture and forestry, construction, business and finance, engineering, energy, tourism and hospitality, science, and health technology.
- How to find a job in New Zealand Find out where to look for work, what your visa options are, and how to check your qualifications and see if you need occupational registration.

## How to find a job in New Zealand
Find out where to look for work, what your visa options are, and how to check your qualifications and see if you need occupational registration.
- What working in New Zealand is like If you are thinking about moving to New Zealand and getting a job, it may help to know more about what working here is like.

## What working in New Zealand is like
If you are thinking about moving to New Zealand and getting a job, it may help to know more about what working here is like.
- Main job sectors in New Zealand New Zealand has many different industries requiring workers with specific skills and experience. These industries include agriculture and forestry, business and finance, construction, education and training, energy, engineering, health care, health technology, science, and tourism and hospitality.

## Main job sectors in New Zealand
New Zealand has many different industries requiring workers with specific skills and experience. These industries include agriculture and forestry, business and finance, construction, education and training, energy, engineering, health care, health technology, science, and tourism and hospitality.
- Finding short-term work when on a working holiday If you have a working holiday visa, you can work in short-term, seasonal jobs, in a variety of industries, while travelling around New Zealand.

## Finding short-term work when on a working holiday
If you have a working holiday visa, you can work in short-term, seasonal jobs, in a variety of industries, while travelling around New Zealand.
- Register for information Receive job alerts matched to your profession and country of residence from recruiters in New Zealand.

## Register for information
Receive job alerts matched to your profession and country of residence from recruiters in New Zealand.
